posts.author: Avin
posts.community: KRN Heat Exchanger and Refrigeration Ltd
posts.text: Say we suppose 7x of current sales that is 4200 crore. For sanity purpose let’s say 4000 crore in FY 2028 from the current 600 crore. Now come to OPM - say all government incentives etc etc take it to 22%. For every rupee sales increase they need to invest working capital and capex also post FY 2028. Even before that if they want to grow in 2028 due to capacity caps. FY 2028 EBITDA comes at 880 crore. PAT ~ 600 crore and free cash at ~ 400 crore. Main problem is they need to further keep investing and growing for the next 7-8 years at 20% rev growth rate to justify a ~ 8000 crore mcap in FY 28…
